IBB Shuttle Service

Trusted Premium Shuttle Service

Premium Shuttle Service, Designed Around You

Book Now

Premium Private Shuttle Service Designed Around You

IBB Shuttle Service is a premium private shuttle booking platform focused on safety, flexibility, and reliability. We provide whole-vehicle rentals, carefully selecting professional drivers and modern vehicles to ensure a seamless travel experience.

Safe & Secure

All drivers are fully verified, and vehicles undergo regular inspections to ensure the highest level of safety.

24/7 Service

Enjoy flexible booking with reliable service available around the clock for your convenience.

Premium Quality

Our modern fleet and professional drivers deliver a premium travel experience every time.

Customer First

Our dedicated support team is ready to assist you before, during, and after your journey.

Our Services

Airport Shuttle

Reliable airport transfers to and from all major airports in Thailand

Leisure Travel

Comfortable transportation for sightseeing and vacation trips

Corporate Travel

Professional business transportation with punctuality guaranteed

Convenience

Focused on comfort throughout every journey.

Safety

Committed to the highest safety standards for our customers.

Premium Vehicles

A fleet of clean, modern vehicles ready to serve you.

Our Pricing Plans

Zone-based pricing with no hidden fees. Price varies by route and vehicle type. Contact us for a personalized quote.

Car — 1-4 passengers

Perfect for solo travelers or small groups

Van — 5-10 passengers

Ideal for families and medium groups

Bus — 11+ passengers

Best for large groups and tours

Book Your Premium Shuttle with Confidence

Enjoy reliable service, flexible scheduling, and dedicated support before, during, and after your journey.
